positive: A sophisticated, symmetrical illustration featuring intertwined botanical motifs and abstract celestial elements. The central composition highlights gracefully curved stems, stylized peonies, monstera leaves, and curling vine patterns, all framed by delicate crescent moons and nebulous dust trails. The aesthetic is a blend of Art Nouveau line art and clean vector graphic design, utilizing a highly contrasting, limited color palette: deep midnight blue, muted terracotta, pale gold, and sage green. Composition must be perfectly centered, ensuring strong silhouettes and maximum negative space, optimized for apparel printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, grainy, text, watermark, signature, multiple figures, bad anatomy, ugly, noisy, realistic photo, 3d render, depth of field, gradients, messy, asymmetrical
